module.name: no-unsafe-json-parse
module.description: Disallow treating JSON.parse results as typed data without validation.

scenarios.name: should allow unknown-first parsing and validator wrappers
scenarios.given: code assigning JSON.parse to unknown or immediately passing it to an approved validator
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parse call

scenarios.name: should report asserted JSON.parse results
scenarios.given: code using as or angle-bracket assertions around JSON.parse

scenarios.name: should suggest unknown-first parsing for simple variables
scenarios.given: a variable initializer directly asserts or annotates a JSON.parse result
scenarios.when: the rule reports the unsafe parse
